title: forevercraft
description: Dive into a world where intricate automation from OriTech meets the thriving communities of Minecolonies! Build complex machines and then integrate them seamlessly into your growing towns, creating a truly dynamic and self-sufficient colony.
body: Begin by establishing your foothold in the world with Minecolonies. Claim territory, construct a town hall, and attract citizens to your burgeoning settlement. Direct your villagers to gather resources, build structures, and manage the daily operations of your growing town. Experience the satisfaction of watching your small outpost evolve into a bustling community, each NPC playing a vital role in its success. Alongside your colonial endeavors, delve into the world of Oritech, a mod focused on intricate machinery, power generation, and automated systems. Explore diverse processing chains for ores and resources, build automated farms and quarries, and set up logistical networks using pipes and drones. Harness various energy sources to power advanced machines, craft powerful tools and armor, and unlock new technological capabilities.
